welcome_title: Hello there, Welcome to your SigNoz workspace
not_sending_data_desc: You're not sending any data yet. SigNoz is so much better with your data — start by sending your telemetry data to SigNoz.
explorer_title: Filter and save views with the Explorer
explorer_desc: Explore your data, and save useful views for everyone in the team.
dashboard_desc: Create a dashboard to visualize your data.
alert_desc: Create bespoke alerting rules to suit your needs.
services_empty_title: You are not sending traces yet.
services_empty_description: Start sending traces to see your services.
